name: RoboPets Parrot
description: A robotic companion pet in the form of an African Grey Parrot. This is the premium model from AI Companions Genius Series, known for it's high level reasoning abilities and extensive knowledgebase.

name: Holographic Entertainment System
description: A holographic display system consisting of a base projection unit capable of generating a 360 deg Realvision image 5m in diameter equipped with TouchSense, Scent-gen technology, and Immersion audio

name: Automated Welding Station
description: An industrial laser welder paired with robotic arms capable of welding pre-fabricated metal panels. Suitable for terrestrial and zero-G operation.

name: Pre-bent Pipe Section 90
description: 90 Degree bend pipe sections 100mm diameter, gas certified.

name: T section pipe
description: T section pipe, 100mm diameter, gas certified.
